description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 12 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 30 mins per day. His tracked work was split across Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL, with activity spanning 3 projects. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded in the data.
